page.title: Template:Universities and colleges in Fooland category header

revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{#invoke:HTMLDecode | HTMLDecode | text={{PAGENAME}} }}|pattern=^Universities and colleges in %a.-$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:Universities and colleges in Fooland category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"Universities and colleges in Fooland"}}, where "Fooland" is a country, continent, or populated place.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{Universities and colleges in Fooland category header/outer core|diagnose={{{diagnose|}}}|location={{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^Universities and colleges in (%a.-)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}|parentlocation1={{{parentlocation1|{{{1|}}}}}}|parentlocation2={{{parentlocation2|{{{2|}}}}}}|tail={{{tail|{{{3|}}}}}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:Universities and colleges in Fooland category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"Universities and colleges in Fooland"}}, where "Fooland" is a country, continent, or populated place.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation}}
